subject: Drop Holy Panda X tactile switch — cross-section with rounded-bump stem emphasis
notes: Splash applied as a wash over the bottom housing (the article's 'warm body from nylon bottom' acoustic claim) plus a single accent dot+ring at the right-side bump apex of the stem — the focal mechanism. Stem is drawn with cubic-bezier outward-bowing skirt legs to make the rounded-bump geometry visually legible vs. a sharp-leg profile. Composition stack mirrors the family architecture (top housing → dashed seam → stem → spring → bottom housing), with the seam line drawn slightly heavier than a typical explode line because the white-top / black-bottom parting seam is the Holy-Panda visual identity. A small leaf-contact bend enters from the lower left and kisses the left bump apex, so the eye reads leaf → apex → bump curvature. A Δ7g bracket+label on the right margin names the 60→67g actuation-to-bottom-out delta in single-color line work (no splash). Brass-bronze ornamental dot at top-right and left-margin didactic ticks preserved per the hero-art family convention. Splash hue oklch(0.55 0.105 40) sits warmer/darker than Oil King's coral (0.71 0.135 30) and FR4's terracotta (0.66 0.13 45), distinct from MX2A's cherry-red and HMX Cloud's pale cyan — next slot in the family rotation.
